designSystem.style: Video-First Hero — bold, energetic, high-contrast dark UI with gradient cards, geometric shapes, and smooth micro-interactions. Duotone gradients throughout, pulsing live indicators, waveform animations, and floating stitch previews.

features: Daily prompt rotation with animated transitions
7-day calm streak tracker with visual progress
3-slot media upload flow with animated state
Animated processing screen with real progress bar
Preferences and app settings with live toggles
Dark/light theme toggle accessible on home and profile
